intake.title: Check my case
intake.subtitle: Professional mortgage advice · we'll get back to you within 24 hours
intake.privacy: Your details are secure and will not be shared without your consent.
intake.draftRestored: We saved your details — you're back where you left off.

composition.title: Let's start with the basics

personal.title: Personal details

property.title: Property details
property.description: What you know about the property and the financing you want.

income.title: Income & employment
income.description: Employment and income details for each borrower.

story.title: Tell us
story.description: Anything that helps us understand what you need.
story.requestDetailsPlaceholder: e.g. We're a young couple looking to buy our first home...
story.consent: I agree that Kaufman Finance Group may contact me and store my details per the <policy>privacy policy</policy>.

success.title: Thank you! We got your request
success.body: We'll get back to you shortly, usually within 24 hours.
success.contact: For urgent questions you can call us.

errors.consentRequired: Please accept the privacy policy to continue.
errors.contactRequired: Please provide a phone or email so we can reach you.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests from this address. Please try again in an hour.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Not authorized.

statistics.title: Statistics & analytics
statistics.subtitle: Office performance — cases opened and executed, pipeline, and per-advisor breakdown.

advisor.title: By advisor
advisor.name: Advisor
advisor.empty: No advisor activity in this period.

empty.title: No data available yet
empty.body: Once cases move through their stages, statistics will appear here. If you've just deployed, make sure the statistics database migration has been applied.

hub.title: Advisor mortgage workspace
hub.subtitle: Fast, manual-input calculators for client conversations: mix building, stress checks, affordability, tax and closing costs. No live bank-rate dependency.

mix.description: Build a full mortgage mix with rates, tracks, payment methods, regulatory checks and amortization.

compare.description: Compare 2-4 alternative mixes and see which is cheaper, steadier, more flexible or riskier.

scenario.description: Stress-test rate and CPI changes and show the client how repayment can move over time.

affordability.description: Estimate maximum mortgage, monthly payment, DTI and LTV from income, equity and obligations.

tax.description: Calculate purchase tax and closing cash needs from Israeli tax brackets and advisor-entered cost assumptions.

refinance.title: Refinance
refinance.description: Compare current and new loans, break-even, fees and total savings.

earlyRepayment.title: Early repayment
earlyRepayment.description: Evaluate which track to repay and whether to reduce payment or shorten term.

clientReport.title: Client report
clientReport.description: A polished PDF that pulls the chosen simulations, charts, risks and advisor conclusion.

violations.title: The mortgage structure must be valid before saving
violations.amount_mismatch: Track total is {actual}, but mortgage amount is {limit}.
violations.term_too_long: Mortgage term is {actual} months; maximum is {limit} months.

mix.title: Mix simulator
mix.subtitle: Enter rates manually and calculate live without a server round-trip.

saveDisabled.noTitle: Enter a simulation name to save
saveDisabled.violations: Resolve the regulatory violations to save

primary.hint: Every marked mix is attached to the bank document (one page each)
primary.error: Failed to update the bank-document mixes. Try again.

errors.unauthorized: You are not allowed to save simulations.
errors.rate_limited: Too many saves. Try again later.
errors.regulatory: The mortgage structure does not meet the thresholds.
errors.unknown: Saving the simulation failed. Try again.

tracks.title: Tracks
tracks.rateNote: Prime rate = Bank of Israel base + 1.5% margin; eligibility is discounted 0.5% and capped at 3%.

results.title: Live result
results.snapshotNote: Saving creates a server-calculated snapshot for future reports.

composition.title: Mix composition
composition.empty: Add tracks to see the mix composition.

baskets.title: Uniform baskets (Bank of Israel)
baskets.hint: Load a standard mix structure for the current loan amount, then adjust the rates.

compare.title: Mix comparison
compare.subtitle: Build 2-4 alternative mixes for the same loan and compare them live.
compare.baseSubtitle: These figures apply to every mix you compare.
compare.editHint: Switch tabs to edit each mix

table.title: Comparison table
table.bestNote: Highlighted cells mark the best value in each row (lower is better).

scenario.title: Interest & index simulator
scenario.subtitle: See how a rise in interest or index would affect the monthly payment over the life of the mortgage.
scenario.mixSubtitle: Enter the mix that the scenario will test.
scenario.scenarioSubtitle: Pick a preset or adjust the parameters manually.

affordability.title: Affordability & capacity
affordability.subtitle: Estimate how much the client can responsibly borrow using income, obligations, equity, LTV and debt-ratio constraints.
affordability.inputsSubtitle: All figures are advisor-entered and recalculated live in the browser.

tax.title: Purchase tax & closing costs
tax.subtitle: Estimate purchase tax and cash-to-close from Israeli brackets and advisor-entered transaction costs.
tax.inputsSubtitle: Purchase-tax defaults use Israel Tax Authority residential brackets published for 16.1.2025-15.1.2028; special cases still require professional review.

report.title: Client report
report.subtitle: Add an advisor conclusion and download the report as a PDF.
report.conclusionPlaceholder: Write your assessment and conclusion for the client here…
report.emailDialogTitle: Email the simulation report to the client
report.emailDefaultBody: Hello, attached is the mortgage simulation report we prepared for you. We are happy to help with any questions. Best regards, Kaufman Finance Group
report.emailAttachNote: The simulation report (PDF) is attached automatically.
report.emailSent: The report was emailed to the client.

errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to generate this report.
errors.rate_limited: Too many reports generated. Try again in an hour.
errors.render_failed: Report generation failed. Please try again.
errors.no_email: The client has no email address. Add one on the client card.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Please enter your credentials.
login.forgotPassword: Forgot password? Contact the system administrator to reset it.
login.footer: © 2026 Kaufman Finance Group · All rights reserved
login.signedOutDeactivated: Your account is no longer active. Please contact your administrator.

forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.successTitle: If the account exists, a link was sent
forgotPassword.successBody: Check your inbox (and the spam folder). The link expires shortly. If no email arrives within a few minutes, contact your administrator.
forgotPassword.emailUnconfigured: Email delivery isn't configured, so a reset link can't be sent. Contact your administrator to reset your password.

errors.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.weakPassword: Password must include at least one letter and one digit.
errors.unauthorized: Your invite has expired. Ask the admin for a new link.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in an hour.
errors.unknown: Saving the password failed. Please try again.

simulators.pageSubtitle: Thresholds that control hard blocking for mortgage structure validity.

simulators.subtitle: These values are used by validateMix on the client and again on server save.

errors.unauthorized: You are not allowed to update thresholds.

banks.subtitle: Manage the banks and non-bank lenders — add, edit, logo and color

toast.inUse: Can't delete — this lender is used by cases. Deactivate it instead
toast.system: Can't delete a built-in system lender

checklists.title: Document checklists
checklists.subtitle: The preset lists offered by the "Add ready-made list" button in a case checklist. Edit their items, add new lists, or deactivate ones you no longer use.

fields.itemsHint: One item per line. Empty lines are dropped.

row.systemLocked: A built-in list can't be deleted — deactivate it instead

office.title: Office details
office.subtitle: Office name, contact details and address

help.auditRetention: How many days the audit log is kept before automatic deletion. Set this to your office's legal retention obligations (default: 365).
help.deletedRetention: How many days deleted items stay in the recycle bin before permanent deletion (default: 14).

sla.title: Status SLAs
sla.subtitle: How many days a case may sit in each status before an alert fires
sla.intro: Leave a field empty to disable the alert for that status. When a case exceeds the threshold, bell notifications are sent to the advisor and the manager, and repeat once a week while the case stays in the same status.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Password and sessions
security.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter and a digit.
security.signOutEverywhereHint: Ends all your active sessions on every device.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.needsUpper: Password must contain an uppercase letter
errors.needsLower: Password must contain a lowercase letter

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.hint: Add a second layer of protection using an Authenticator app on your phone.
mfa.confirmDisable: Disable two-factor authentication? Your account will be less secure.

dialog.title: Enable two-factor authentication
dialog.subtitle: Scan the QR code with an Authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password) and enter the 6-digit code it shows.
dialog.step2: Scan the QR code or enter the secret key manually
dialog.step3: Enter the 6-digit code shown in the app below
dialog.qrAlt: QR code to scan in your authenticator app

errors.invalidCode: Code is invalid or expired. Try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose which email notifications you receive
notifications.emailHint: In-app notifications (the bell) are always on. These control email notifications only.
notifications.emailTaskAssigned: Email when a task is assigned to me
notifications.emailTaskCompleted: Email when a task I created is completed
notifications.emailMentions: Email when someone mentions me in a comment
notifications.emailCaseStatusOverdue: Email when one of my cases is overdue in a stage

celebrations.title: New documentation celebrations
celebrations.description: Shows a gold stamp and confetti after a documentation post. This switch applies to the whole team.
celebrations.failed: We couldn't save this setting. Please try again.

push.title: Mobile push notifications
push.desc: Get notified about tasks and updates even when the app is closed. Best after installing the app to your home screen.
push.denied: Permission denied — allow notifications in your browser/device settings and try again
push.unsupported: This browser doesn't support notifications. On iPhone: install the app to your home screen first (iOS 16.4+).

display.title: Case page display
display.subtitle: Choose which blocks on the case page open automatically when you open a case
display.hint: Checked blocks open expanded; the rest stay collapsed (the default).

celebrations.title: Documentation celebrations
celebrations.description: When on, a brief celebration animation plays each time a team member adds documentation to a case.

unreadStar.title: Unviewed-case marker
unreadStar.description: A small star appears on every dashboard case and resets on a schedule. It clears the moment you open the case — so you can see at a glance which cases you haven't reviewed.

people.title: Team & permissions
people.subtitle: Manage who has access and what each role can do

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.subtitle: Manage which permissions each role has in the system
roles.adminLocked: The manager role includes all permissions and cannot be edited.
roles.overridesNote: Per-member permission overrides (when set) take precedence over the role settings here.

toast.failed: Failed to update permission. Please try again.
toast.adminLocked: The manager's permissions cannot be edited.

userPermissions.title: Permissions per person
userPermissions.roleDefault: Role default: {role}. Any switch you change here overrides the role.
userPermissions.adminLocked: The manager includes all permissions and cannot be edited.

toast.failed: Failed to update permission. Please try again.

recycleBin.title: Deleted cases
recycleBin.subtitle: Cases that were deleted and can be restored within 14 days. After that they are permanently deleted automatically.
recycleBin.empty: No deleted cases in the bin
recycleBin.purgeIn: {days, plural, =0 {will be purged today} =1 {will be purged tomorrow} other {will be purged in # days}}
recycleBin.paused: Case purging is currently paused for records-retention reasons — no cases are auto-deleted and permanent delete is unavailable. All deleted cases are shown.

confirmDialog.title: Permanent deletion
confirmDialog.description: Case #{caseNumber} will be gone forever — there will be no way to restore it. Files on Drive will remain.
confirmDialog.typeToConfirm: To confirm, type the case number: {caseNumber}

errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission for this action
errors.not_found: Case not found or already restored
errors.mismatch: Case number doesn't match — try again
errors.retention_paused: Permanent delete is currently paused for records-retention reasons.

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.subtitle: Create a full backup of your system data and store it in Google Drive
backup.notConfiguredBody: Google Drive hasn't been set up by the developer yet. Until then, backups to Drive can't be created.
backup.notConnectedBody: To back up your system data to Drive, first connect the office's Google Drive account.
backup.dataNote: The backup includes all system data — cases, borrowers, banks, tasks, leads and settings. The document files themselves are stored separately in Drive and Storage.
backup.restoreConfirm: Restore data from {name}? This only re-adds records currently missing from the database — existing records won't be changed or deleted.

toast.done: Backup complete — {count} records saved to Drive
toast.rateLimited: A backup just ran. Wait 10 minutes before the next one.
toast.restoreInvalid: This file isn't a valid backup.

import.title: Data import
import.subtitle: Import cases from a CSV or Excel file
import.instructions: Upload a CSV or Excel file with a header row. Each row creates a new case with a primary borrower. An unrecognized status opens as 'Case opened', and the advisor is matched by email address.
import.columns: Supported columns: first_name, last_name, national_id, phone, email, status, advisor_email, short_note
import.blockedTitle: Import blocked — fix {count} rows and re-upload. Nothing was imported (all-or-nothing).
import.unmappedHeaders: Unrecognized columns that were not imported: {headers}

rowErrors.duplicate_in_file: Row {row}: duplicate ID within the file
rowErrors.national_id_exists: Row {row}: ID already exists in the system
rowErrors.unknown_advisor: Row {row}: advisor not found or inactive
rowErrors.possible_duplicate: Row {row}: a client with the same name and phone already exists (without an ID) — add an ID or remove the row

errors.unauthorized: Not authorized to import
errors.empty: File is empty or has no recognized columns
errors.rate_limited: Too many imports. Try again in an hour.

integrations.title: Integrations & connections
integrations.subtitle: Connect the system to external tools — Google Drive, Google Calendar, WhatsApp, email.

drive.title: Google Drive
drive.subtitle: Store documents in your office's KFG_Cases folder
drive.notConfiguredBody: The developer hasn't set up a Google Cloud project yet. Until then, documents are stored in Supabase Storage only. Contact the developer to enable this.
drive.connectIntro: Clicking 'Connect' will redirect you to Google to approve access. The KFG_Cases folder will be created automatically in your Drive, and the system will upload documents for new cases there.
drive.backupStale: No successful backup in the last 26 hours — check the Drive connection.
drive.backupNever: No backup has ever run — connect Google Drive to enable nightly backups.
drive.scopeNote: Full Drive permission — required for bidirectional sync (files you upload directly to Drive will appear in the app too).
drive.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect from Drive? Existing files stay in Drive, but the system won't upload new files until you reconnect.

errors.oauth_not_configured: Integration not configured. Contact the developer.
errors.state_mismatch: Security check failed (state mismatch). Try again.
errors.admin_only: Only an admin can connect integrations.
errors.missing_params: Missing parameters on return from Google. Try again.
errors.access_denied: You declined consent in Google. Connection not completed.
errors.drive_scope_missing: You did not grant Drive access. Check all permissions on Google's consent screen.
errors.generic: Connection failed. Try again or contact the developer.

message.backup_stale: No recent backup — check the Google Drive connection (Settings → Integrations)
message.erasure_stale: File erasure isn't running — check the cleanup job and the Google Drive connection (Settings → Integrations)

email.footer: Kaufman Finance Group · Automatic system message

task_assigned.subject: A new task was assigned to you
task_assigned.heading: You have a new task

task_completed.subject: A task you assigned was completed
task_completed.heading: Task completed

invite.subject: You've been invited to Kaufman Finance Group
invite.heading: Welcome to Kaufman Finance Group
invite.intro: An account was created for you. Click the button to activate it and choose your password.
invite.linkNote: This link is single-use and expires after a short time.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password — Kaufman Finance Group
passwordReset.heading: Reset password
passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset your account password. Click the button to choose a new one.
passwordReset.linkNote: This link is single-use and expires after a short time. If you didn't request a reset, ignore this email.

intakeConfirm.subject: We received your inquiry — Kaufman Finance Group
intakeConfirm.heading: Thank you, {name} — we got your inquiry
intakeConfirm.intro: Your questionnaire has reached our office. A mortgage advisor will review the details and contact you by the next business day.
intakeConfirm.step1: We carefully review the details you provided
intakeConfirm.step2: We call you for a short introductory conversation
intakeConfirm.step3: Together we build the most cost-effective path for you
intakeConfirm.note: Have a question already? Reply to this email or call +972-2-568-1681.

case_mention.subject: You were mentioned in a case comment
case_mention.heading: You were mentioned
case_mention.body: {actor} mentioned you in a case comment: "{preview}"

task_mention.subject: You were mentioned in a task comment
task_mention.heading: You were mentioned in a task

task_reminder.subject: Task reminder — {task}
task_reminder.heading: Task reminder
task_reminder.body: The task "{task}" is waiting for you.

case_status_overdue.subject: Case {caseNumber} is overdue in its stage
case_status_overdue.heading: A case is stuck in a stage
case_status_overdue.body: Case {caseNumber} has been in "{status}" for {days} days — past the configured threshold.

intakeOffice.subject: New questionnaire from the website — {name}
intakeOffice.heading: A new questionnaire arrived from the website

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage team members, roles, and access

deactivateConfirm.title: Deactivate this member?
deactivateConfirm.body: {name} won't be able to sign in until reactivated. Their history and cases are preserved.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this member?
deleteConfirm.body: {name} will be removed from the team and can no longer sign in. Their active cases and tasks move to you; their history and closed cases stay recorded under their name.

toast.selfRoleChange: You can't change your own role. Ask another admin.
toast.resendNotAllowed: An invite link can only be sent to an active member who has never signed in
toast.protected: The office owner's account is protected — its role, status and existence can't be changed

invite.title: Add team member
invite.inviteLinkNote: An invite email with a single-use link will be sent to the member. They pick their own password through that link.
invite.successBody: An account was created for {email}. They will receive an activation link to choose their own password.
invite.inviteLinkLabel: Activation link (share with the member manually)
invite.inviteLinkWarning: Single-use, expires quickly. Share only over a secure channel (WhatsApp/SMS).

errors.unauthorized: Only an admin can add team members.
errors.rateLimited: Too many invites sent recently. Please try again in an hour.
errors.generic: Sending the invite failed. Please try again.
